hero.question: Will Bitcoin dip to $45,000 by December 31, 2026?
hero.prob_take: Bears just took the wheel as Bitcoin holders got spooked by macro headwinds, pushing this down 10 points in a day and signaling real conviction that $45K is back in play. At 44.5%, the market is fairly pricing a 2026 dip that's almost inevitable given crypto's volatility, but you're getting paid enough here to buy the dip if you think Bitcoin stabilizes above $50K in Q4 2025.

daily_take.headline: Bitcoin's $45K Floor Just Got 10 Points Cheaper. Smart Money's Loading Up.
daily_take.deck: Bitcoin dip odds collapsed 10 points in 24 hours, landing at 44.5%. The market's pricing in a Santa rally narrative, but $1.5M in volume suggests real conviction behind the selloff. With two years to maturity and macro volatility nowhere near pricing in, 44.5% undervalues the downside risk. Buy the dip at these levels.

sidebar.headline: Somalia strike odds surge 15 points on a single headline. Check what actually moved before chasing a 95.7% certainty that might be priced for perfection.
sidebar.label: US Somalia Strikes (Feb 2026): 95.7%

sidebar.headline: India's T20 odds jumped 9 points on one tournament cycle. Momentum plays work until they don't, and 44.5% paired with playoff randomness feels late.
sidebar.label: India T20 World Cup 2026: 44.5%

sidebar.headline: Anduril IPO odds cratered 22 points in 24 hours. A defense contractor's timeline depends on geopolitics and funding cycles that move faster than you think. The selloff might be the trap.
sidebar.label: Anduril IPO (Before 2027): 28.5%
